name: Ceiling Storage Black - Brightroom™: Automotive Organizer, Car Accessories, Polyester, 21"x30.5"
description:
Keep your car clutter-free and organized with this Ceiling Storage from Brightroom™. This double-layer ceiling storage with a mesh construction easily holds clothes, pillows, blankets and more, while the drawstring closure prevents items from falling out while you drive. Featuring a lightweight construction in black, it's easy to install and suitable for most vehicles.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
